name: Brasil TecPar
name_long: Brasil Tecpar Servicos de Telecomunicacoes S.A.
notes:
This ASN is part of **Brasil TecPar**, a Brazilian telecommunications group providing broadband Internet, corporate connectivity, transport and IT infrastructure services. The company operates multiple ASNs to support its regional networks, enable traffic, and integrate networks acquired through its ongoing expansion strategy. A complete and up-to-date list of these ASNs can be found at **AS53062:AS-MNA**.

Our main peering/transit ASN is [**AS53062**](http://as53062.peeringdb.net/).

*For detailed peering policies, please refer to:*
[https://bgp.as53062.net.br/policy](https://bgp.as53062.net.br/policy)
